summary: A complete collection of detailed Google Stitch AI prompts for every page of the LMS (Learning Management System) for Schools & Colleges. Each prompt covers exact layout, components, typography, colors (with hex codes), gradients, states, and interactions — derived directly from LMS_PRD.md and design.md. Includes prompts for: Landing Page, Login, Admin Dashboard & all sub-pages, Teacher Dashboard & all sub-pages, Student Dashboard & all sub-pages, and shared/utility pages.
